ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that produces the item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing item is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is in stock */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., across shoulder, chest) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the value corresponds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement for the given size */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., height, weight) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
